requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (KS IEC 60335-2-24; no EU-style F-Gas regime in Kenya)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（KS IEC 60335-2-24；肯尼亚无欧盟式氟气体法规）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（KS IEC 60335-2-24；肯亞無歐盟式氟氣體法規）

summary.en: Kenya does not operate a standalone EU-style F-Gas Regulation. For household refrigerators, refrigerant control sits inside the product safety standard — the Kenyan adoption KS IEC 60335-2-24 carries the flammable-refrigerant provisions (charge limits, ventilation, and ignition-source requirements) derived from IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA, applicable to R-600a (isobutane, an A3 lower-flammability hydrocarbon with GWP of about 3). R-600a is widely accepted in the Kenyan market and is not subject to any phase-down prohibition there. At the national policy level, Kenya is a Party to the Montreal Protocol and its Kigali Amendment and manages the import and phase-down of HFCs/ozone-depleting substances through the National Environment Management Authority (NEMA) under the Montreal Protocol controls — but this is an import-control/quota regime for the gases, not an EU-style horizontal product-marking law. Charge quantity and refrigerant type must be documented and verified against KS IEC 60335-2-24 within the KEBS PVoC assessment.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚不设独立的欧盟式氟气体法规。家用电冰箱的制冷剂管控置于产品安全标准内——肯尼亚采用的KS IEC 60335-2-24载有源自IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃制冷剂规定（充注量限制、通风及点火源要求），适用于R-600a（异丁烷，A3低可燃性碳氢化合物，GWP约3）。R-600a在肯尼亚市场被广泛接受，且不受任何削减禁令约束。在国家政策层面，肯尼亚是《蒙特利尔议定书》及其《基加利修正案》缔约方，通过国家环境管理局（NEMA）依《蒙特利尔议定书》管控措施管理HFC/消耗臭氧物质的进口与削减——但这是针对气体的进口管控/配额制度，而非欧盟式横向产品标识法律。充注量及制冷剂类型须在KEBS PVoC评定内依据KS IEC 60335-2-24记录并核验。
summary.zht: 肯亞不設獨立的歐盟式氟氣體法規。家用電冰箱的製冷劑管控置於產品安全標準內——肯亞採用的KS IEC 60335-2-24載有源自IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的可燃製冷劑規定（充注量限制、通風及點火源要求），適用於R-600a（異丁烷，A3低可燃性碳氫化合物，GWP約3）。R-600a在肯亞市場被廣泛接受，且不受任何削減禁令約束。在國家政策層面，肯亞是《蒙特利爾議定書》及其《基加利修正案》締約方，通過國家環境管理局（NEMA）依《蒙特利爾議定書》管控措施管理HFC/消耗臭氧物質的進口與削減——但這是針對氣體的進口管控/配額制度，而非歐盟式橫向產品標識法律。充注量及製冷劑類型須在KEBS PVoC評定內依據KS IEC 60335-2-24記錄並核驗。

standards_or_laws: KS IEC 60335-2-24 — flammable refrigerant (R-600a) charge limits, ventilation and ignition-source requirements (Kenya adoption of IEC 60335-2-24, Annex AA provisions)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol + Kigali Amendment — HFC/ODS import control and phase-down, administered in Kenya by the National Environment Management Authority (NEMA)
KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) — refrigerant type and charge documentation verified within the consignment Certificate of Conformity

summary.en: China addresses refrigerant safety for household appliances primarily through GB 4706.13-2014, which incorporates R-600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24, supported by GB 9237 (safety requirements for refrigerating systems, aligned with ISO 5149). China is also a Party to the Montreal Protocol and ratified the Kigali Amendment in June 2021, operating its own HFC phase-down schedule administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Because both China's GB 4706.13 and Kenya's KS IEC 60335-2-24 derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the R-600a charge-limit and safety requirements are technically close; Chinese R-600a refrigerators are generally well-positioned for Kenya on the refrigerant dimension, subject to documentation and PVoC verification.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 4706.13-2014处理家用器具的制冷剂安全，其中纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性规定，并以GB 9237（制冷系统安全要求，参照ISO 5149）为支撑。中国亦为《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约方，并于2021年6月批准《基加利修正案》，由生态环境部（MEE）管理本国HFC削减计划。由于中国GB 4706.13与肯尼亚KS IEC 60335-2-24均源自IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a充注量限制及安全要求技术上接近；使用R-600a的中国电冰箱在制冷剂方面对肯尼亚一般具备良好条件，但须经文件与PVoC核验。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 4706.13-2014處理家用器具的製冷劑安全，其中納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a可燃性規定，並以GB 9237（製冷系統安全要求，參照ISO 5149）為支撐。中國亦為《蒙特利爾議定書》締約方，並於2021年6月批准《基加利修正案》，由生態環境部（MEE）管理本國HFC削減計畫。由於中國GB 4706.13與肯亞KS IEC 60335-2-24均源自IEC 60335-2-24，R-600a充注量限制及安全要求技術上接近；使用R-600a的中國電冰箱在製冷劑方面對肯亞一般具備良好條件，但須經文件與PVoC核驗。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Annex provisions for flammable refrigerant (R-600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: Stated plainly: Kenya has no EU-style horizontal F-Gas product regulation, so there is no separate refrigerant-marking law to satisfy beyond the safety standard — the refrigerant gap is small and mostly documentary: (1) the product documentation must declare the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge weight in grams, with safety precautions per KS IEC 60335-2-24; (2) the R-600a charge must be verified against the KS IEC 60335-2-24 charge limits within the KEBS PVoC assessment — Chinese CCC test data is usually technically sufficient but must be re-verified by the PVoC agent; (3) the gas itself (bulk HFC/ODS imports) is controlled at national level by NEMA under the Montreal Protocol/Kigali Amendment, which affects refrigerant suppliers more than it affects a finished R-600a appliance; (4) since R-600a is a hydrocarbon with GWP about 3, it is not within any HFC phase-down quota concern, so R-600a refrigerators face the least refrigerant-side friction of any refrigerant choice.
gap.zh: 据实而言：肯尼亚无欧盟式横向氟气体产品法规，故除安全标准外无须满足单独的制冷剂标识法律——制冷剂差距很小且主要为文件性：（1）产品文件须声明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克），并附KS IEC 60335-2-24的安全注意事项；（2）R-600a充注量须在KEBS PVoC评定内依据KS IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值核验——中国CCC检测数据通常技术上充分，但须由PVoC代理机构重新验证；（3）气体本身（散装HFC/ODS进口）在国家层面由NEMA依《蒙特利尔议定书》/《基加利修正案》管控，对制冷剂供应商的影响大于对成品R-600a器具的影响；（4）由于R-600a为GWP约3的碳氢化合物，不涉及任何HFC削减配额问题，故R-600a电冰箱在所有制冷剂选择中面临的制冷剂端阻力最小。
gap.zht: 據實而言：肯亞無歐盟式橫向氟氣體產品法規，故除安全標準外無須滿足單獨的製冷劑標識法律——製冷劑差距很小且主要為文件性：（1）產品文件須聲明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克），並附KS IEC 60335-2-24的安全注意事項；（2）R-600a充注量須在KEBS PVoC評定內依據KS IEC 60335-2-24充注量限值核驗——中國CCC檢測數據通常技術上充分，但須由PVoC代理機構重新驗證；（3）氣體本身（散裝HFC/ODS進口）在國家層面由NEMA依《蒙特利爾議定書》/《基加利修正案》管控，對製冷劑供應商的影響大於對成品R-600a器具的影響；（4）由於R-600a為GWP約3的碳氫化合物，不涉及任何HFC削減配額問題，故R-600a電冰箱在所有製冷劑選擇中面臨的製冷劑端阻力最小。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via KS IEC 60335-2-24 (R-600a charge limits, ventilation), verified within KEBS PVoC. No EU-style horizontal F-Gas product regulation; bulk HFC/ODS imports controlled nationally by NEMA under Montreal Protocol/Kigali Amendment.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

source.publisher: National Environment Management Authority (NEMA), Kenya — Montreal Protocol / ozone-depleting substances; KEBS PVoC for appliance refrigerant verification

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Kenya has no EU-style horizontal F-Gas product regulation — R-600a refrigerant control sits inside KS IEC 60335-2-24 (charge limits, ventilation) and is verified within KEBS PVoC. R-600a (GWP about 3) is widely accepted and faces no phase-down prohibition; bulk HFC/ODS gas imports are controlled nationally by NEMA under the Montreal Protocol/Kigali Amendment. Chinese R-600a units are well-positioned; the main task is documenting refrigerant type and charge weight and having the charge re-verified by the PVoC agent.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 肯尼亚无欧盟式横向氟气体产品法规——R-600a制冷剂管控置于KS IEC 60335-2-24（充注量限制、通风）内，并在KEBS PVoC内核验。R-600a（GWP约3）被广泛接受且无削减禁令；散装HFC/ODS气体进口由NEMA依《蒙特利尔议定书》/《基加利修正案》在国家层面管控。中国R-600a产品条件良好；主要工作是记录制冷剂类型及充注量并由PVoC代理机构重新验证充注量。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 肯亞無歐盟式橫向氟氣體產品法規——R-600a製冷劑管控置於KS IEC 60335-2-24（充注量限制、通風）內，並在KEBS PVoC內核驗。R-600a（GWP約3）被廣泛接受且無削減禁令；散裝HFC/ODS氣體進口由NEMA依《蒙特利爾議定書》/《基加利修正案》在國家層面管控。中國R-600a產品條件良好；主要工作是記錄製冷劑類型及充注量並由PVoC代理機構重新驗證充注量。
